ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate entry */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency against which the exchange rate is quoted */,
  "buying_rate" TEXT /* Buying rate for the currency */,
  "central_rate" TEXT /* Central rate for the currency */,
  "selling_rate" TEXT /* Selling rate for the currency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the exchange rate was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the exchange rate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the exchange rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country issuing the currency */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Currency symbol */,
  "sub_unit" TEXT /* Subunit of the currency */,
  "sub_unit_ratio" INTEGER /* Ratio of the subunit to the main unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rate_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical exchange rate entry */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange rate */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency against which the historical rate is quoted */,
  "buying_rate" TEXT /* Buying rate for the currency */,
  "central_rate" TEXT /* Central rate for the currency */,
  "selling_rate" TEXT /* Selling rate for the currency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the exchange rate was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical exchange rate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the historical exchange rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rate_history_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchange_rates ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange rate data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for additional context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchange_rates ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange rate that triggered the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., rate increase, rate decrease) */,
  "threshold" TEXT /* Threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message containing details of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, acknowledged, resolved) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchange_rates ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role is a default role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the permission is a default permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role association was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
